recommendations.overview: A Hollywood songwriter goes through a mid-life crisis and becomes infatuated with a sexy blonde newlywed.

recommendations.title: Victor/Victoria
recommendations.overview: A struggling female soprano finds work playing a male female impersonator, but it complicates her personal life.

recommendations.title: Breakfast at Tiffany's
recommendations.overview: Holly Golightly is an eccentric New York City playgirl determined to marry a Brazilian millionaire. But when young writer Paul Varjak moves into her apartment building, her past threatens to get in their way.

recommendations.title: Days of Wine and Roses
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic falls in love with and gets married to a young woman, whom he systematically addicts to booze so they can share his "passion" together.

recommendations.title: Experiment in Terror
recommendations.overview: A man with an asthmatic voice telephones and assaults clerk Kelly Sherwood at home and coerces her into helping him steal a large sum from her bank.

recommendations.title: Son of the Pink Panther
recommendations.overview: The illegitimate son of Inspector Clouseau is on the case of the kidnapped Princess Yasmin.

recommendations.title: Sunset
recommendations.overview: Tom Mix and Wyatt Earp team up to solve a murder at the Academy Awards in 1929 Hollywood.

recommendations.title: Operation Petticoat
recommendations.overview: A World War II submarine commander finds himself stuck with a damaged sub, a con-man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

recommendations.title: The Pink Panther Strikes Again
recommendations.overview: Charles Dreyfus, who has finally cracked over inspector Clouseau's antics, escapes from a mental institution and launches an elaborate plan to get rid of Clouseau once and for all.

recommendations.title: A Shot in the Dark
recommendations.overview: Inspector Jacques Clouseau, smitten with the accused maid Maria Gambrelli, unwittingly turns a straightforward murder investigation into a comedic series of mishaps, testing the patience of his irritable boss Charles Dreyfus as casualties mount.
